gaps.description: src/providers/ directory (anthropic.ts, openai.ts, provider.ts, index.ts) listed in Architecture Module Structure does not exist — entire provider layer has been extracted to agentic-core external package
Architecture says types.ts defines Provider and ToolDefinition interfaces (line 11) but both are imported from agentic-core, not defined anywhere in agentic-lite
createProvider() factory referenced in Architecture data flow (line 28) and module structure (line 16) does not exist in agentic-lite — provider instantiation handled by agentic-core's agenticAsk()
index.ts exports askStream() (async generator streaming API) which is not documented anywhere in ARCHITECTURE.md — significant public API surface undocumented
ARCHITECTURE.md lines 55-75 contain leftover prompt/task instructions that are not part of the architecture documentation — should be removed for documentation integrity
Architecture Data Flow diagram (lines 27-36) shows ask() calling createProvider() directly, but actual implementation calls agenticAsk() from agentic-core which handles provider creation internally
Provider Resolution / Custom Provider Fallback section (lines 47-53) describes local resolution logic but this logic now lives in agentic-core, not in agentic-lite
Architecture Overview (line 5) states 'exposes a single ask() function' but public API is ask() + askStream() + type re-exports + AgenticFileSystem re-exports
ToolDefinition interface uses field name 'parameters' in code but architecture calls it 'input schema' (line 43); field naming mismatch between design and implementation
Architecture says src/tools/index.ts is 'tool registry' (line 22) but it's a barrel re-export; tool registration logic (buildTools) lives in src/ask.ts
Architecture Key Interfaces section (line 40) omits toolConfig from AgenticConfig fields; code includes toolConfig?: { search?: { apiKey?, provider? }, code?: { timeout? } }
All 5 tool files exist and match design: search.ts (Tavily/Serper), code.ts (QuickJS/Pyodide), file.ts (AgenticFileSystem), shell.ts (agentic-shell), index.ts
Core files exist: src/index.ts (public exports), src/ask.ts (agent loop), src/types.ts (shared interfaces)
AgenticConfig and AgenticResult interfaces implemented in types.ts matching documented fields
Core agent loop pattern (prompt → provider chat → tool_use check → execute tools → return result) is functionally correct via agentic-core delegation
